name: Calibration Laboratories
description: The most comprehensive directory of A2LA- and NVLAP-accredited calibration laboratories, instrument calibration services, and metrology specialists in the United States.
certifications: NVLAP Accredited Laboratory (NIST National Voluntary Laboratory Accreditation Program)
PJLA-Accredited Calibration Laboratory (Perry Johnson Laboratory Accreditation)
cityPagePromptContext: Calibration laboratories provide accredited measurement and testing services to manufacturers, aerospace firms, medical device companies, and other industries requiring traceable accuracy. ISO/IEC 17025-accredited labs perform dimensional, electrical, mechanical, thermal, and pressure calibrations with NIST-traceable reference standards. Quality teams hire them ahead of ISO 9001 and AS9100 audits, after equipment repairs or new instrument purchases, or when measurement uncertainty must be formally documented. Accreditation bodies such as A2LA and NVLAP publish laboratory scope certificates specifying exactly which parameters and ranges each lab is authorized to calibrate.
buyerSearchContext: when preparing for ISO 9001 or AS9100 audits, after instrument repair or purchase, or when measurement traceability must be formally documented for regulatory compliance

editorialAuthor.name: Nick Palmer
editorialAuthor.title: Founder & Lead Researcher
editorialAuthor.bio: Nick built this directory to help quality teams find accredited calibration labs without wading through unaccredited shops that can’t support an ISO audit — a gap he discovered when sourcing calibration vendors for a manufacturing client whose instrument traceability chain failed a third-party audit.

schema.label: ISO/IEC 17025 Accredited
schema.scrape_hint: Look for accreditation certificate numbers, A2LA or NVLAP scope certificate links, or explicit ISO/IEC 17025 statements on homepage, about page, or footer. A2LA certificate numbers follow the format "XXXX.01".

schema.label: Years of Experience
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from 'About Us', team bios, or '20+ years serving [industry]' statements; calculate from founding year if business start date is provided.

schema.label: Calibration Scopes
schema.scrape_hint: Scan services menu, scope of accreditation certificates, or laboratory capability pages; match keywords like 'electrical calibration', 'dimensional metrology', 'torque calibration', 'temperature calibration', or 'pressure gauge calibration'.

schema.label: On-Site / Mobile Calibration
schema.scrape_hint: Check for mentions of 'mobile calibration', 'on-site service', 'field calibration', or 'we come to you' on services or FAQ pages.

schema.label: NIST-Traceable Standards
schema.scrape_hint: Look for statements like 'NIST-traceable', 'traceable to national standards', 'unbroken traceability chain', or references to NIST reference standards in lab description, certificates, or methodology pages.

schema.label: Standard Turnaround Time
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from service descriptions, FAQs, or 'Turnaround Time' sections; look for phrases like 'certificates issued same day' or 'standard 5-business-day turnaround'.

schema.label: Industries Served
schema.scrape_hint: Parse 'Industries Served', homepage copy, or case study pages; match sector keywords like 'AS9100', 'FDA-regulated', 'medical device manufacturing', 'automotive quality', or 'defense contractor'.

schema.label: Phone Number
schema.scrape_hint: Extract from header, footer, contact page, or click-to-call buttons; normalize to standard format (e.g., (555) 123-4567).

schema.label: Website
schema.scrape_hint: Capture primary domain from browser address bar, homepage links, or business listings; ensure full URL with https:// protocol.
